name: cloakli
description: Cloakli Chrome 확장 프로그램 - 자동 테스트 (외부 의존성 없음, Node 내장 test runner만 사용)

scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/content-core.test.js tests/entitlement.test.js tests/content-integration.test.js tests/tab-actions.test.js tests/popup.test.js tests/regression.test.js tests/build.test.js tests/i18n.test.js tests/website.test.js
scripts.package:prod: npm test && npm run build:prod && npm run validate:prod && node scripts/package-release.js
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run build:prod && npm run validate:prod
scripts.website:deploy: node scripts/check-website.js && npx wrangler pages deploy website --project-name=cloakli
